<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh-yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh-yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh-yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as [[Yang Wood Dragon]] (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following [[Yin Water Rabbit]] and preceding [[Yin Wood Snake]]. In [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], [[Heavenly Stems|Kinoe (甲)]] represents the [[Yin and yang]] aspect of [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while [[Earthly Branches|Dragon (辰)]] represents the Yang aspect of [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]]. This combination is classified as an instance of [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|相剋]].

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn

<!--
==
* Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu)
***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu)
***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn

-->
==Years of Yang Wood Dragon==
A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Kōshin'''
|-
![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[44]]
* [[104]]
* [[164]]
* [[224]]
* [[284]]
* [[344]]
* [[404]]
* [[464]]
* [[524]]
* [[584]]
* [[644]]
* [[704]]
* [[764]]
* [[824]]
* [[884]]
* [[944]]
|
* [[1004]]
* [[1064]]
* [[1124]]
* [[1184]]
* [[1244]]
* [[1304]]
* [[1364]]
* [[1424]]
* [[1484]]
* [[1544]]
* [[1604]]
* [[1664]]
* [[1724]]
* [[1784]]
* [[1844]]
* [[1904]]
* [[1964]]
|
* [[2024]]
* [[2084]]
* [[:en:2144|2144]]
* [[:en:2204|2204]]
* [[:en:2264|2264]]
* [[:en:2324|2324]]
* [[2384]]
* [[:en:2444|2444]]
* [[2504]]
* [[2564]]
* [[2624]]
* [[2684]]
* [[2744]]
* [[2804]]
* [[2864]]
* [[:en:2924|2924]]
* [[:en:2984|2984]]
|}

==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]), the month of [[March]] is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] months or the [[Solar term]], meaning the period from [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] to the day before [[Lixia]].

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Lîm-chin]]
[[zh-yue:壬申]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=ja|甲辰|qq=Yang Wood Dragon|version=102784583|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Yîm-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Affenvi]]
[[de:Yang Wood Dragon]]

[[ja:甲辰]]
[[zh:甲辰]]
[[ko:갑진]]
[[fr:Dragon de bois]]
[[de:Holz-Drache]]

[[af:Aardeaap (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Affeneen]]
[[en:Earth Monkey]]
[[fr:Singe de terreboishak]]
[[it:Yim-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:임신 (간지)]]
[[vi:Nhâm Thân]]
[[za:Yimceij]]
[[zh:壬申]]
[[ar:Yang Wood Dragon]]

<!--Yang Wood Dragon--><!--Yang Wood Dragon-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gák-sìng]]
[[hak:Kap-sìn]]
[[vi:Giáp Thìn]]
[[za:Gyapsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:甲辰]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gák-sìng]]
[[hak:Kap-sìn]]
[[vi:Giáp Thìn]]
[[za:Gyapsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:甲辰]]
{{wikidata link|Q904754}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
